message.hidden_places.mossgate_chest.loc: The chest is locked. You need a Mossgate Key.
message.hidden_places.frostbound_chest.l: The chest is locked. You need a Frostbound Key.
message.hidden_places.sunveil_chest.lock: The chest is locked. You need a Sunveil Key.
message.hidden_places.wildroot_chest.loc: The chest is locked. You need a Wildroot Key.
advancements.hidden_places.root.title: Hidden Places
message.hidden_places.sealed_sanctum_map: No Sealed Sanctum was found nearby. Try exploring farther first.
message.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.tal: The Test Wayfinder studies you. Shift-right-click if you want trouble.
message.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.hos: The Test Wayfinder grips his staff. Bad choice.
message.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.spe: The Test Wayfinder refuses to fight. Speak first.
screen.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.intr: The ragged wayfinder studies you from beneath a cracked hood. His staff taps once against the ground.
screen.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.repl: Names are small things. Roads remember better than men do.
Four signs, four keys, one sealed road. Bring the map together, or the Sanctum will spit you out like a bad omen.
screen.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.opti: You look too weak to guard these roads.
screen.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.repl: The wayfinder's eyes narrow. The road grows quiet. There is only one way left now.
screen.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.trad: The wayfinder opens a ragged pouch. Nothing here is free, but some roads can be bought.
message.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.tra: You need 1 Emerald for this trade.
The Wayfinder trades you a Mossgate Key.
screen.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.repl: The wayfinder opens a ragged pouch. Nothing here is free, but some roads can be bought.
message.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.tra: You need 1 Emerald for this trade.
You have already traded with this Wayfinder.
screen.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.trad: The Wayfinder takes the emerald and hands you a Mossgate Key. The bargain is done.
The Wayfinder closes his pouch. You need 1 Emerald for this trade.
The Wayfinder waits. Your inventory is full.
The Wayfinder shakes his head. He has already sold you what he was willing to part with.
The trade failed. Something about the bargain went wrong.
screen.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.repl: The bargain is done. The wayfinder has nothing more to sell you.
message.hidden_places.test_wayfinder.tra: The bargain is done. There is no fight left here.
message.hidden_places.mossgate_wayfinder: The forest guardian lowers his staff. There is no fight here.
The old forest guardian studies you kindly beneath the brim of his worn hat. His staff rests in the moss.
You look too gentle to guard this place.
I keep the green gate and the quiet paths. Some call me a guardian. I prefer neighbor.
The sealed road is not found by force. Bring the signs together, and the old ocean will answer.
The guardian only smiles. The forest has heard worse from crows.
The guardian opens a small moss-lined pouch. He wants a rare flower, not coin.
The bargain is done. The guardian has already given you the Mossgate Key.
The guardian asks for a torchflower. In return, he offers the key of the moss gate.
The guardian accepts the torchflower and hands you a Mossgate Key. The bargain is done.
The guardian waits. You need 1 Torchflower for this trade.
The guardian waits. Your inventory is full.
The guardian shakes his head gently. He has already given you what he could.
The trade failed. Something about the bargain went wrong.
message.hidden_places.jungle_offering_pe: The pedestal is already holding an offering.
screen.hidden_places.sunveil_wayfinder.i: The desert wayfinder sits calmly, a flute resting across his hands. The air around him feels too still.
screen.hidden_places.sunveil_wayfinder.r: I keep the sun-road. If you want its key, you will have to endure the song beneath the sand.
Then listen carefully. When the flute rises, my little ones rise with it. Survive the whole song, and the key is yours.
Good. Do not blink when the sand begins to move.
Quiet. The song is already being played.
You have already endured my song. The Sunveil Key was earned.
message.hidden_places.sanctum_seeker.not: The Sanctum Seeker finds no sealed place nearby.
